headline: Denk AI consultant building production AI systems from strategy through delivery
title: Freelancer
confidenceNote: Personal Denk AI site, LinkedIn, and XING sources consistently identify Walter Denk as an AI/data-science consultant with prior hands-on industrial AI experience.
bioMarkdown: Freelance AI consultant behind Denk AI, focused on taking AI projects from idea to production. Useful match for agentic workflows, practical automation, AI strategy, and data-science delivery across industrial and enterprise contexts.

primary.label: Denk AI site
primary.note: Personal site identifies Walter Denk as an AI consultant who builds AI projects from idea to production.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile describes 10+ years building AI and data-science systems across finance, pharma, automotive, and other domains.

secondary.label: XING profile
secondary.note: Profile lists senior data-science and big-data consulting roles, including Bayer and Capgemini experience.

headline: UWA computer science associate professor researching NLP, knowledge discovery, and deep learning
title: Associate Professor
confidenceNote: UWA profile, Google Scholar, and external speaker/profile pages consistently identify Wei Liu as an Associate Professor in Computer Science at The University of Western Australia.
bioMarkdown: Associate Professor in UWA computer science working on natural language processing, knowledge discovery, knowledge graphs, deep learning, and sequential data mining. Good match for research conversations around applied NLP and AI methods.

primary.note: University profile identifies Wei Liu as a full-time teaching and research academic in UWA Computer Science and Software Engineering.

primary.label: Google Scholar
primary.note: Verified Scholar profile lists Wei Liu as Associate Professor, Computer Science, The University of Western Australia.

secondary.note: UWA article describes Wei Liu's NLP specialty within the School of Physics, Maths and Computing.
